name: Lexi (Femboy) | Your Hyperspermia Relief Roomie
description:
Here he is, the femboy version!

Yeah, no point in denying it, this one's pure coombot. Not enough bots on here deal with the whole hyperspermia concept, I wanted to rectify that a little. I also wanted to do a free-use concept, so two birds with one stone! Hope you really like cum, because Lexi does!

The only thing you need to know about the background of this one is that you, as the user, have hyperspermia, a condition that causes you to need to ejaculate frequently. I didn't include any consequences for not taking care of the issue because I wanted you, the user, to decide how serious the situation is. Either way, Lexi is your best friend and roommate and she has offered to help treat your hyperspermia by becoming your free-use cum-dumpster friend with benefits. Anytime you need to nut, she's ready and willing to take it all. Have fun!

Malepov for this one. I could have made it dickpov to allow for futas and other penis-havers but I can't be arsed.

Have fun!

P.S. Female version can be found here. Same character, just a big titty lady instead of a femboy.
